recap: Renamed all camelCase functions to snake_case across colors.py, projects.py, statusbar.py and all call sites; also renamed refresh_statusbar‚Üíredraw_statusbar and checkForForcedRefresh‚Üícheck_for_statusbar_reload to satisfy GLOSSARY Redraw/Reload terminology.

Added attentionIds set to tabState; moved attention file I/O from per-tab build_tab_data() to once-per-cycle in first_pass(); renamed parseRawTabData.py‚Üítab_data.py and firstPass‚Üífirst_pass; updated GLOSSARY to reflect once-per-cycle read semantics.

Renamed pickTabsToDisplay.py‚Üípick_tabs.py; renamed all 4 functions to snake_case; renamed secondPass‚Üísecond_pass and drawTab‚Üídraw_tab_item in tabs_second_pass.py; updated reload.py and all call sites; also snake_cased all local variables (review finding) and updated stale firstPass comments.
